invariant.essence: Complexence: the capability and field of orienting inside complexity by preserving meaning across representations, run as a recursive loop.
constraints: domain-independent (not tied to any single subject)
substrate-independent (works with any capable mind, human or machine)
meaning must survive transformation across representations

representations.content: The capability of standing inside a system larger than yourself and still choosing.
{ "loop": "Sigma -> omega -> mu -> pi -> eta -> alpha -> tau(Sigma) -> Sigma'" }

delta.note: coined as a capability; found a field underneath it
